name: editor4b: Enter splits a block via script (insertParagraph) without crashing the native engine
_note: Regression guard for the native rich-transaction crash on script-handled structural edits (vibe/radiant/Radiant_Issue3.md). Before the fix, key_press Enter aborted the process via a re-entrant focus_transition assertion while the JS beforeinput reconcile detached the focused surface. YY only lands if Enter routed to the JS handler (preventDefault), the split applied, and the caret continued in the new block.
